org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor

Class AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view.AbstractViewComponent
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure.AbstractSubFigure
          • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure.AbstractModelObjectSubFigure<A>
            • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor.AnchorFigure<A>
              • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor.AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure<A>
  • Type Parameters:
    A - is the type of the model anchor associated to this figure.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ViewComponent>, PropertyOwner, SubFigure, ModelObjectView<A>, ViewComponent, ViewComponentConstants, PropertyNames, View
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure

    public abstract class AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
extends AnchorFigure<A>
    This figure is for all the rectangular or squared anchor figures.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND, Mahdi HANNOUN
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure

        public AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure(UUID viewUUID,
                               float x,
                               float y,
                               float width,
                               float height)
        Construct a new Anchor.

        The specified width and height are set inconditionally. The minimal width becomes the min between the specified width and the ViewComponentConstants.DEFAULT_MINIMAL_SIZE. The minimal height becomes the min between the specified height and the ViewComponentConstants.DEFAULT_MINIMAL_SIZE. The maximal width becomes the max between the specified width and the ViewComponentConstants.DEFAULT_MAXIMAL_SIZE. The maximal height becomes the max between the specified height and the ViewComponentConstants.DEFAULT_MAXIMAL_SIZE.

        Parameters:
        viewUUID - is the UUID of the view that is enclosing this figure.
        x - horizontal position of this Anchor within his NodeFigure.
        y - vertical position of this Anchor within his NodeFigure.
        width - horizontal dimension of this Anchor within his NodeFigure.
        height - vertical dimension of this Anchor within his NodeFigure.

    • Method Detail

      • getConnectionPointFrom

        protected Point2D getConnectionPointFrom(Point2D position,
                             Point2D absoluteAnchorPosition,
                             AnchorLocation location)
        Replies the best connection point from the specified point to this anchor figure.
        Specified by:
        getConnectionPointFrom in class AnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
        Parameters:
        position - is the position from which the connection may be computed.
        absoluteAnchorPosition - is the absolute position to consider for this anchor (it may be different than the real absolute position).
        location - is the location of the anchor on the node.
        Returns:
        the connection point, never null.
